title: Warning (Horror TBS)
body:
![Warning](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c15be3ec9730dc9517b320e770fd8204ccd6ce2.png)




## After downloading a cracked launcher off some sketchy website, you noticed something is off. Once the world was created, everything seemed normal at the beginning. But after some time, random mobs spawned where they shouldn't, random chat messages as if the world was in multiplayer, and the constant feeling of being watched. 


WARNING: This mod has destructive events/broken world generation. Don't use existing worlds that matter to you.

More lore down below
 


Join the discord for announcements
https://discord.gg/XEzTWqASEh



<details>
<summary>Videos</summary>

</details>




# Features
75 Events 

18 Entities

1 Effect

2 Items

1 BossFight



SPOILERS BELOW:



# Entities

Warning - can spawn as a passive mob, rarely disguises as a pig. You can chat with it

Warning (Attack) - Will build a pillar to the player and break nearby blocks it stares at. Has to stand for around a minute before attacking. Doesn't kill instantly


Fake Pig - A very small chance (0.1%) that a random pig can transform into it. Follows the player and spawns Warning (Attack) when killed.

Fatal - There is a 40% chance for them to spawn every 15-30 minutes. They will chase the player when spawned, teleporting at random intervals near the player. After touching a player, the entity will dissapear and give the effect "Fatal"

Fake Cow - spawnrate is the same as fake pig. Acts like a normal cow, except it doesn't make any sounds

Fake Chicken - spawnrate as always. Very noticeable, doesnt have eyes and always flaps its wings around (I don't know why??)

Stalker - Spawns sometimes and slowly walks over to the player, looking at it will make it dissapear but if it touches you then Warning (Attack) will spawn



Missing - Not implemented

# Effects

Fatal - An effect that lasts 2 and a half minutes, once its done, the player will die, losing all the items they have in their inventory. If the effect ends early, for example by drinking milk, the player will just die early.

# Items

??? - Appears when Phase 2 starts. Gives great buffs to the player but dissapears after, reappearing after some time in the player's inventory.

Strange Book - Appears when the Main Boss is defeated. 

# Events

Lightning - A lightning strike will spawn on the player

Advancement - The player will gain an advancement

Fake Pig - A fake pig will spawn

Warning - A passive warning will spawn

Water - a flowing water block will appear in the sky

Bedrock - A bedrock block will appear in the sky

Dimension (Removed in 0.0.4) - The player will get transported to a new dimension for around 2 and a half minutes

Chat - A chat message will appear

Night - The day will turn into night

Gift - The player will gain 5 Diamonds

Fatal - Fatal will spawn.

Missing - A block with no textures will appear

MAJOR EVENTS WILL HAPPEN LESS OFTEN.

# Lore
Every single mob that isn't a fake version of an existing mob, is a player which downloaded the same version of the launcher you did, punished for pirating the game, all of their files getting encrypted and their appearance used in-game to catch other players, making them share their fate. 


<details>
<summary>Warning Lore</summary>
  Warning is one of the players, although they have full control in the world, wanting the player to free the others.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Fatal Lore</summary>
  Fatal is the main cause of everything, a virus in the game that was meant to only teach people a lesson about piracy, instead using others to have their fun and cause trauma on any unsuspecting victim
</details>

<details>
<summary>Chat Messages</summary>

You can ask these questions to both of the fellas (Type them out EXACTLY like how its in here).
Also not all questions included, only the ones which are interesting
1. Hello
2. Who are you
3. What are you
4. Can you help me
5. Fatal
6. Who is Fatal
7. I don't like you
8. How are you
9. Can you see me
10. Wanna be friends
11. Warning
12. Where is Fatal
13. Do you hate me
14. What do you do
15. Who is that
16. Why are you here
17. World
18. Moon
19. Events
20. How can i help you
21. I'm hungry
22. I'm hurt



</details>








# Q&A
## Q: Is there any lore?
A: Not much, but there will be more in the future

## Q: How can i talk to the entities?
A: Always start with a capital letter, if asking questions, don't use a question mark at the end (Don't ask why).
There are also 2 entities you can talk to. One of them you can talk to at every moment in-game, and the second has to be in your presence. You can ask them the same questions and they will give different answers
a
## Q: Config?
A: Not yet

## Q: Does Multiplayer work?
A: Didn't test it.

# Credits
Fatal BossFight theme - "Destructor" by NoughtZero Music (No longer used after version 0.2.1)
